---
title: "R Toolchain Smoke Test"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false
  pdf_document:
    toc: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

## Purpose

This document verifies that the shared `~/repos` development container can run R,
load common analysis packages, render R Markdown, and compile PDF output.

## Package Check

```{r package-check}
required_packages <- c("tidyverse", "rmarkdown", "knitr", "jsonlite", "ggplot2")
package_status <- data.frame(
  package = required_packages,
  available = vapply(required_packages, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)
)

package_status
```

## Analysis Check

```{r analysis-check}
library(ggplot2)

assessment_smoke <- data.frame(
  assessment = paste("Checkpoint", 1:6),
  average_score = c(72, 75, 78, 80, 83, 86),
  completion_rate = c(0.82, 0.84, 0.86, 0.88, 0.91, 0.93)
)

summary(assessment_smoke)
```

## Plot Check

```{r plot-check}
ggplot(assessment_smoke, aes(x = assessment, y = average_score, group = 1)) +
  geom_line(color = "#2563eb", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "#111827", size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Synthetic Assessment Smoke Test",
    x = "Assessment",
    y = "Average Score"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
